## Problem

What concrete agent, Unicode, CJK, OCR, code-review, or RAG workflow problem does this solve?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the smallest useful version of the feature.

## Alternatives Considered

What else did you try?

## Data Source / Provenance

If this involves glyph or lexical facts, what source should OmniGlyph use?

## Scope Boundary

What should this feature explicitly not do?
